testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_new

failure.message: Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="add-guest"]')

self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_new.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateNew object at 0x7f6f82ff2f00> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f6f83059b80>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_new(self, config): """ Create Greeting Card as new registered user
:param config: :return: """ _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages['login_modal'] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] evite_greeting_card = config.pages["evite_greeting_card"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = (f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
evite_gallery_page.select_mega_nav(action="greeting_cards", url="cards") evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
# step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card") # step2_egift_card.select_egift_card_toggle(toggle=False)
step1_template.select_next(url="recipients") > step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["recipients"], for_greeting_card=True)
_test_name = 'test_evite_greeting_card_create_new' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f6f83059b80> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7f6f83059400> evite_greeting_card = <commons.pages.evite.evite_greeting_card.EviteGreetingCard object at 0x7f6f83059b50> evite_overview = <commons.pages.evite.evite_overview.EviteOverview object at 0x7f6f83058ec0> logger = <Logger test_evite_greeting_card_create_new (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f6f83059af0> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f6f830582c0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_new.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateNew object at 0x7f6f82ff2f00> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f6f83059730> step2_egift_card = <commons.pages.evite.step2_egift_card.Step2EGiftCard object at 0x7f6f83059130> step3_grc_messages = <commons.pages.evite.step3_grc_messages.Step3GRCMessages object at 0x7f6f830597c0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f6f83059a00> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7f6f830598b0>

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_premium

failure.message: Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="step1-texteditor-input"]')

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fc83adf4bf0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fc83adff230>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = (f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
# Step 1: Card Editor > step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data)
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fc83adff230> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fc83adfe900> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fc83ae4e360> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fc83adfe840> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fc83adfed80> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fc83adfdfd0> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fc83adfd8e0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fc83b113800> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fc83c98d8e0> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fc83adfeb10> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fc83adf4bf0> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fc83adfeb70> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fc83adfeab0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fc83adfe270> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fc83adfe5a0> user_email_addr = 'evite-01262026-095205-80-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fc83adfe6c0>

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

failure.message: Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="step1-texteditor-input"]')

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f5e84b5f9e0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f5e84bc4f80>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template()
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time()
if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
# Step 1: Card Editor > step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data)
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f5e84bc4f80> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7f5e84bc4710> evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7f5e84b87740> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7f5e84bc79e0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f5e84bc5bb0> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_free (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f5e84bc4b90> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f5e84bc4c50> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f5e84bc51f0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7f5e84ca6c30> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7f5e84ca7170> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7f5e84bc49b0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f5e84b5f9e0> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f5e84bc5d60> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7f5e84bc7800> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f5e84bc45f0> user_email_addr = 'evite-01262026-095206-55-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7f5e84bc4830>
test_evite_rsvp_free.py:87: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ../../commons/pages/evite/step1_template.py:307: in fill_text_editors self.enter_text_editor(test_data=test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] + number_of_text_editors = 1 self = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f5e84bc5d60> test_data = {'RSVP_NOTE': 'Guests', 'guests': [{'comment': 'THIS IS A YES RSVP GUEST COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'THIS WILL BE REPLACE...ne': '-test@evitetest.com', 'keep_me_logged_in': False, 'password': 'test1234'}, 'first_name': 'automation', ...}, ...} ../../commons/pages/evite/step1_template.py:145: in enter_text_editor if self.wait_until_element_is_visible(timeout=self.timeout, locator=self._text_editor): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ self = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f5e84bc5d60> test_data = 'testCIYTSQ123test_20260126-095254\nFebruary 17, 2026 4:00 PM\nTest Location Name8800 Sunset Blvd\nWest Hollywood, 90067' _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f5e84bc5d60> timeout = 30 locator = ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="step1-texteditor-input"]'), fail = True
def wait_until_element_is_visible(self, timeout=settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT, locator=None, fail=True): """ This function wait the time given until an element is visible in one page
@return: True if element is visible. False if element is not visible or timeout expired """ time.sleep(1)
try: WebDriverWait(self.selenium, timeout).until( ec.visibility_of_element_located(locator), f"WebDriverWait: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}" ) # If found, return True return True except (TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException): self.logger.warning(f"Except: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}") time.sleep(1)
# Log and Raise exception if fail is True if fail: msg = f"Except: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}" self.logger.exception(msg) > raise Exception(msg) E Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="step1-texteditor-input"]')

testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event

failure.message: Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="event-guest-lists"]')

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateFromPastEvent object at 0x7f1230081df0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f12300e9670>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event(self, config): logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
evite_homepage = config.pages["evite_home_page"] page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
sql_string = (f"SELECT user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title FROM public.evite_events WHERE " f"user_email_addr != 'automation_events@evitetest.com' AND " f"env = '{settings.ENV}' AND " f"event_premium = FALSE AND " f"event_draft_guests = FALSE AND " f"event_draft = FALSE AND " f"event_cancelled = FALSE AND " f"created_by = 'evite' AND " # f"event_create_date > now()::DATE AND " # f"event_sent_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_create_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_sent_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_date > now()::DATE-14 ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1;") # We have Thanks only for 14 days
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = None user_pass = None user_first_name = None user_last_name = None event_title = None
# DB & API Connections quake_v3_account = QuakeV3Account(inspect.stack()[0][3]) quake_v3_user = QuakeV3User(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title = cursor.fetchone() else: logger.warn(f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}") config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip("DB have no record for sql")
except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Check email length if len(user_email_addr) > 59: msg = "Email is 60+ characters" logger.error(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
# Get user's first and last name cursor = None sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: db_connect.close() cursor.close()
# Need for payment page self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = f"{user_first_name} {user_last_name}"
# LogIn through the API sign_in_response = quake_v3_account.account_session_sign_in(email_address=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get All Past Events past_events_response = quake_v3_user.get_past_events( user_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["user_id"], session_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["token"], )
# Go through the list of events and get one that is not a card or draft event, and hosted by the user past_event = None for event in past_events_response.json()["message"]["events"]: if event["guest_status"] == 1 and event["used_as"] == "invitation": past_event = event logger.info(f"Found a past event: {event['title']}, ID {event['event_id']}") break
# Skip the rest of the test if no qualifying event was found if not past_event: msg = "Could not find a past event with this user." logger.info(f"{msg}") pytest.skip(msg)
# LogIn login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass) evite_homepage.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
my_events.select_event_options(event_title=event_title, event_option="send_thanks", event_status="You hosted", url="cards")
evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card") # step2_egift_card.select_egift_card_toggle(toggle=False)
step1_template.select_next(url="recipients") # Add past event guests > step5_guests.select_guest_content_options(action="event_guest_lists")

self = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f12300e9310> timeout = 30, locator = ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="event-guest-lists"]') fail = True
def wait_until_element_is_visible(self, timeout=settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT, locator=None, fail=True): """ This function wait the time given until an element is visible in one page
@return: True if element is visible. False if element is not visible or timeout expired """ time.sleep(1)
try: WebDriverWait(self.selenium, timeout).until( ec.visibility_of_element_located(locator), f"WebDriverWait: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}" ) # If found, return True return True except (TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException): self.logger.warning(f"Except: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}") time.sleep(1)
# Log and Raise exception if fail is True if fail: msg = f"Except: Can't find element {locator.__str__()}" self.logger.exception(msg) > raise Exception(msg) E Exception: Except: Can't find element ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="event-guest-lists"]')
fail = True locator = ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="event-guest-lists"]') msg = 'Except: Can\'t find element (\'css selector\', \'[data-qa-id="event-guest-lists"]\')' self = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f12300e9310> timeout = 30
../../commons/web.py:350: Exception
